word: G2427 - ἱκανόω - hikanóō - hik-an-o'-o - Make able

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἱκανόω

- Transliteration: Hikanoo

- Phonetic: hik-an-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to make sufficient, render fit

a. to equip one with adequate power to perform duties of one

- Origin: from G2425

- TDNT entry: 07:53,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2425; to enable that is qualify: - make able (meet).
